title: Add contact selector to mobile field and Product Type field to account info

requirements.text: Add an icon button next to the mobile field in the customer detail section that opens a dropdown/popover displaying the primary and secondary contact phone numbers for the account

quotes: edit the customer detail section by adding an icon next to the mobile field. clicking the icon will display the primary and secondary contact for the account

acceptanceCriteria: An icon button appears adjacent to the mobile field
Clicking the icon displays both primary and secondary contact phone numbers
The contact selector UI is visually consistent with the existing design system

requirements.text: Implement click functionality on the contact options in the dropdown so that selecting a contact populates the mobile field with the chosen phone number

quotes: clicking on one of the contacts will populate the mobile field

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking a contact in the dropdown updates the mobile field value
The dropdown closes after selecting a contact
The mobile field displays the selected contact number

requirements.text: Set the primary contact as the default value for the mobile field when the case detail page loads
acceptanceCriteria: The mobile field displays the primary contact phone number by default
The default value is set on initial page load

requirements.text: Add a 'Product Type' field label and value display to the horizontal area containing 'Days Past Due', positioned below the existing Days Past Due field

quotes: edit the horizontal area with 'Days Past Due' by adding a field named 'Product Type' and below it, the type

acceptanceCriteria: A 'Product Type' label appears in the horizontal info area
The field is positioned below the Days Past Due field
The layout maintains horizontal alignment and spacing consistency

requirements.text: Display the product type value which can be 'Loan', 'Credit Card', or 'Overdrawn' below the Product Type label

quotes: the type which can be 'Loan', 'Credit Card' or 'Overdrawn'

acceptanceCriteria: The product type value is displayed below the 'Product Type' label
The value shows one of: 'Loan', 'Credit Card', or 'Overdrawn'
The styling is consistent with other field values in the section

requirements.text: Update the Case type in backend/main.mo to include primaryContact, secondaryContact, and productType fields to support the new UI features
acceptanceCriteria: Case type includes primaryContact field of type Text
Case type includes secondaryContact field of type ?Text (optional)
Case type includes productType field with values limited to 'Loan', 'Credit Card', or 'Overdrawn'
Existing case data structure is preserved during upgrade

constraints: Maintain the existing layout and styling of the customer detail section
Use the established color scheme and UI components from the design system
Preserve existing case data and functionality
nonGoals: Adding the ability to edit or add new contacts
Adding other product type options beyond the three specified
Modifying the existing Days Past Due calculation or display logic
